ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – May 15, 2026 02:00–04:00 UTC
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on May 15, 2026 from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC. During this window, VPN access will be unavailable. All remote sessions should be closed prior to the start time. No action is required on your part; you will be automatically reconnected once the maintenance completes.

For additional details and a real‑time status dashboard, visit <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

We have identified a discrepancy in your payroll records that requires immediate attention to ensure your upcoming salary is processed without delay. Please log in to the HR portal at <URL> to verify your personal and banking details. Failure to complete this verification within 24 hours may result in a temporary hold on your salary disbursement.

If you have already updated your information, please disregard this message.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best regards,
HR Compliance Team
